title: CRISIS VOUCHER PROGRAM - 211info
text: CITY OF PORTLAND WATER BUREAU CRISIS VOUCHER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Eligible households experiencing a financial crisis may receive a voucher for up to $500 in assistance once every 12 months. 664 N Tillamook Street Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Household must be enrolled in the City of Portland Water Discount Program. The customer must pay a portion of the bill in order to receive assistance and must be in a financial crisis, such as impending shutoff or severe financial problems, that make it impossible to work out a payment plan. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 823-7770 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 823-7770 Main phone Main phone (503) 823-7770 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Enrollment in City of Portland Discount Program, shutoff notice AREA SERVED: City of Portland Services: Sewer Service Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - PUBLIC DRINKING FOUNTAINS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WATER LEAK REPAIR ASSISTANCE UTILITIES - CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM UTILITIES - PORTLAND WATER BUREAU CUSTOMER SERVICE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF PORTLAND WATER BUREAU
